# Canvas Connector - Full Documentation

# Canvas Connector 1.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Canvas (Canvas Connector) enables Mule applications to access the Canvas API.

## Configurations

---

### Config

Default configuration.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_Oauth_2_0">OAuth 2.0</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### OAuth 2.0

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>baseUri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Base URI for Canvas API requests.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>TLS settings for HTTPS connections to the authorization server.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumer key as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Secret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumer secret as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs authorization endpoint URL.</p></td><td><p><code>https://salesforce.instructure.com/login/oauth2/auth</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access Token Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs access token endpoint URL.</p></td><td><p><code>https://salesforce.instructure.com/login/oauth2/token</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth scopes to request during the OAuth dance. If not provided, defaults to those in the annotation.</p></td><td><p>*</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The resource owner ID each component uses when not set otherwise.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Before</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to run immediately before the OAuth dance starts.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>After</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to run immediately after an access token is received.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Auth Server Tls Context</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>TLS context for HTTP requests to the authorization server during the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Auth Server Proxy Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Proxy configuration for HTTP requests during the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A reference to an <code>http:listener-config</code> element used to create the listener for the access token callback.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the local HTTP endpoint that starts the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External Callback Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>If the callback is behind a proxy or reachable only indirectly, the URL the OAuth provider should use to reach the callback.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Object Store</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Object store for persisting each resource ownerâs OAuth data. If omitted, the runtime provisions the default store.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Supported Operations

- [Account Get A Single Account](#AccountGetASingleAccount)
- [Account Get The Sub Accounts Of An Account](#AccountGetTheSubAccountsOfAnAccount)
- [Account List Accounts](#AccountListAccounts)
- [Account List Active Courses In An Account](#AccountListActiveCoursesInAnAccount)
- [Assignment Groups List Assignment Groups](#AssignmentGroupsListAssignmentGroups)
- [Assignment List Assignments](#AssignmentListAssignments)
- [Assignment List Assignments By Assignment Groups](#AssignmentListAssignmentsByAssignmentGroups)
- [Course Create A New Course](#CourseCreateANewCourse)
- [Course Delete Conclude A Course](#CourseDeleteConcludeACourse)
- [Course Get A Single Course](#CourseGetASingleCourse)
- [Course Get Bulk User Progress](#CourseGetBulkUserProgress)
- [Course Get Single User](#CourseGetSingleUser)
- [Course Get User Progress](#CourseGetUserProgress)
- [Course List Courses For Users](#CourseListCoursesForUsers)
- [Course List Users In Course](#CourseListUsersInCourse)
- [Course Update A Course](#CourseUpdateACourse)
- [Enrollment Conclude Deactivate Or Delete An Enrollment](#EnrollmentConcludeDeactivateOrDeleteAnEnrollment)
- [Enrollment Enroll A User In A Section](#EnrollmentEnrollAUserInASection)
- [Enrollment Enroll Multiple Users To One Or More](#EnrollmentEnrollMultipleUsersToOneOrMore)
- [Enrollment Enroll User In A Course](#EnrollmentEnrollUserInACourse)
- [Enrollment Get Enrollment By ID](#EnrollmentGetEnrollmentById)
- [Enrollment List Course Enrollments](#EnrollmentListCourseEnrollments)
- [Enrollment List Section Enrollments](#EnrollmentListSectionEnrollments)
- [Enrollment List User Enrollments](#EnrollmentListUserEnrollments)
- [Enrollment Reactivate An Enrollment](#EnrollmentReactivateAnEnrollment)
- [Enrollment Terms Create Enrollment Term](#EnrollmentTermsCreateEnrollmentTerm)
- [Enrollment Terms Delete Enrollment Term](#EnrollmentTermsDeleteEnrollmentTerm)
- [Enrollment Terms List Enrollment Terms](#EnrollmentTermsListEnrollmentTerms)
- [Enrollment Terms Retrieve Enrollment Term](#EnrollmentTermsRetrieveEnrollmentTerm)
- [Enrollment Terms Update Enrollment Term](#EnrollmentTermsUpdateEnrollmentTerm)
- [Login Create A User Login](#LoginCreateAUserLogin)
- [Login Delete A User Login](#LoginDeleteAUserLogin)
- [Login Edit A User Login](#LoginEditAUserLogin)
- [Roles Get A Single Role](#RolesGetASingleRole)
- [Roles List Roles](#RolesListRoles)
- [Section Create Course Section](#SectionCreateCourseSection)
- [Section Cross List A Section](#SectionCrossListASection)
- [Section De Cross List A Section](#SectionDeCrossListASection)
- [Section Delete A Section](#SectionDeleteASection)
- [Section Edit A Section](#SectionEditASection)
- [Section Get Section Information](#SectionGetSectionInformation)
- [Section List Course Sections](#SectionListCourseSections)
- [Submission List Submissions For Multiple Assignments](#SubmissionListSubmissionsForMultipleAssignments)
- [Submission List Submissions From Course Section](#SubmissionListSubmissionsFromCourseSection)
- [User Create A User](#UserCreateAUser)
- [User Edit A User](#UserEditAUser)
- [User List Upcoming Assignments And Calendar Events](#UserListUpcomingAssignmentsAndCalendarEvents)
- [User List Users In Account](#UserListUsersInAccount)
- [User Show User Details](#UserShowUserDetails)
- [Users List Missing Submissions](#UsersListMissingSubmissions)

## Operations

## Account Get A Single Account

`<canvas:account-get-a-single-account>`

Retrieves a single Canvas account by ID.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Account Get The Sub Accounts Of An Account

`<canvas:account-get-the-sub-accounts-of-an-account>`

Lists sub-accounts under a Canvas account, optionally including nested accounts.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>recursive</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include nested sub-accounts.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>order</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>id</p></li><li><p>name</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for sub-accounts in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Account List Accounts

`<canvas:account-list-accounts>`

Lists Canvas accounts available to the authenticated user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Account List Active Courses In An Account

`<canvas:account-list-active-courses-in-an-account>`

Lists active courses for a Canvas account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Assignment Groups List Assignment Groups

`<canvas:assignment-groups-list-assignment-groups>`

Lists assignment groups for a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Assignment List Assignments

`<canvas:assignment-list-assignments>`

Lists assignments for a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Assignment List Assignments By Assignment Groups

`<canvas:assignment-list-assignments-by-assignment-groups>`

Lists assignments within a specific assignment group for a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignment_group_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas assignment group ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Create A New Course

`<canvas:course-create-a-new-course>`

Creates a new course in a Canvas account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Delete Conclude A Course

`<canvas:course-delete-conclude-a-course>`

Deletes or concludes a course, depending on the selected event.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>event</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>delete</p></li><li><p>conclude</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to delete or conclude the course.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONFLICT
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course List Users In Course

`<canvas:course-list-users-in-course>`

Lists users enrolled in a course with optional search, filter, and include options.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>search_term</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Term used to filter results.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sort</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>username</p></li><li><p>last_login</p></li><li><p>email</p></li><li><p>sis_id</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort field for users returned from the course.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_type[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment types to include when listing users.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_role</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment role name filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_role_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment role ID filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>section_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Section IDs to restrict the user list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas user ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Specific user IDs to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_state[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment states to include when listing users.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Update A Course

`<canvas:course-update-a-course>`

Updates an existing course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONFLICT
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED
- CANVAS:UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY

## Enrollment Conclude Deactivate Or Delete An Enrollment

`<canvas:enrollment-conclude-deactivate-or-delete-an-enrollment>`

Concludes, deactivates, deletes, or inactivates a course enrollment based on the selected task.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>task</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>conclude</p></li><li><p>deactivate</p></li><li><p>delete</p></li><li><p>inactivate</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment action to perform on the enrollment record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONFLICT
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

### Parameters

## Enrollment List Course Enrollments

`<canvas:enrollment-list-course-enrollments>`

Lists enrollments for a course with optional filters.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>type[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment types to include in the list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>role[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role filters for the enrollment list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>state[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment states to include in the list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas user ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grading_period_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Grading period ID filter for submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_term_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment term ID filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_account_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS account IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_course_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS course IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_section_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS section IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_user_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS user IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>created_for_sis_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to limit results to users created for SIS.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND

- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR

- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Enrollment List Section Enrollments

Lists enrollments for a course section.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas user Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED
- CANVAS:UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY

## Enrollment List User Enrollments

`<canvas:enrollment-list-user-enrollments>`

Lists course and section enrollments for a user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas user ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>type[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment types to include in the list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>role[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role filters for the enrollment list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>state[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment states to include in the list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grading_period_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Grading period ID filter for submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_term_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enrollment term ID filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_account_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS account IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_course_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS course IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_section_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS section IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sis_user_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>SIS user IDs to match.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>created_for_sis_id[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to limit results to users created for SIS.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Login Delete A User Login

`<canvas:login-delete-a-user-login>`

Deletes a user login.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>user_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas user ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Login Edit A User Login

`<canvas:login-edit-a-user-login>`

Updates an existing user login.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR

- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>role_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role ID for the enrollment.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>role</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role name for the enrollment.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Section Cross List A Section

Cross-lists a section into another course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>new_course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Target course ID for cross-listing.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>override_sis_stickiness</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to override SIS stickiness when updating the course.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Section Get Section Information

`<canvas:section-get-section-information>`

Retrieves details for a single course section.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Section List Course Sections

`<canvas:section-list-course-sections>`

Lists all sections for a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>search_term</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Term used to filter results.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Submission List Submissions For Multiple Assignments

`<canvas:submission-list-submissions-for-multiple-assignments>`

Lists student submissions across multiple assignments in a course.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>course_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>student_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Student user IDs to filter submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignment_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Assignment IDs to filter submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grouped</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to group results by student.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>post_to_sis</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include only assignments posted to SIS.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>submitted_since</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ISO-8601 timestamp; returns submissions submitted on or after this time.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>graded_since</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ISO-8601 timestamp; returns submissions graded on or after this time.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grading_period_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Grading period ID filter for submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>workflow_state</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>submitted</p></li><li><p>unsubmitted</p></li><li><p>graded</p></li><li><p>pending_review</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filters submissions by workflow state.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_state</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>active</p></li><li><p>concluded</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filters submissions by enrollment state.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>state_based_on_date</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to scope workflow state by date.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>order</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>id</p></li><li><p>graded_at</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for submissions in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>order_direction</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ascending</p></li><li><p>descending</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort direction for the ordered submission list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## Submission List Submissions From Course Section

`<canvas:submission-list-submissions-from-course-section>`

Lists submissions for assignments in a course section.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>section_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas course section ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>student_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Student user IDs to filter submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignment_ids[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Assignment IDs to filter submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grouped</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to group results by student.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>post_to_sis</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include only assignments posted to SIS.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>submitted_since</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ISO-8601 timestamp; returns submissions submitted on or after this time.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>graded_since</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ISO-8601 timestamp; returns submissions graded on or after this time.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>grading_period_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Grading period ID filter for submissions.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>workflow_state</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>submitted</p></li><li><p>unsubmitted</p></li><li><p>graded</p></li><li><p>pending_review</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filters submissions by workflow state.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>enrollment_state</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>active</p></li><li><p>concluded</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filters submissions by enrollment state.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>state_based_on_date</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to scope workflow state by date.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>order</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>id</p></li><li><p>graded_at</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for submissions in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>order_direction</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ascending</p></li><li><p>descending</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort direction for the ordered submission list.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include[]</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional associations or nested objects to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## User Create A User

`<canvas:user-create-a-user>`

Creates a new user in a Canvas account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONFLICT
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED
- CANVAS:UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY

## User Edit A User

`<canvas:user-edit-a-user>`

Updates an existing Canvas user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for the Canvas API operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## User List Upcoming Assignments And Calendar Events

`<canvas:user-list-upcoming-assignments-and-calendar-events>`

Lists upcoming assignments and calendar events for the authenticated user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## User List Users In Account

`<canvas:user-list-users-in-account>`

Lists users in a Canvas account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>account_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- CANVAS:BAD_REQUEST
- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:NOT_FOUND
- CANVAS:SECURITY
- CANVAS:SERVER_ERROR
- CANVAS:TIMEOUT
- CANVAS:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Show User Details

`<canvas:user-show-user-details>`

Retrieves profile and related details for a single user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Canvas resource ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional correlation ID for the request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- CANVAS:CLIENT_ERROR
- CANVAS:CONNECTIVITY
- CANVAS:FORBIDDEN
- CANVAS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
